---
title: 'White Noise Update: The Tower Book One'
date: '2016-05-26T06:49:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5582847364463867662'
blogger_filename: '/2016/05/white-noise-update-tower-book-one.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Fiction'
---

I am half way through editing my first draft. There are plot holes and inconsistencies to fix, and I work full time. But I'm hoping to publish before the end of the year (2016).
